title: Timeline only allowing weekdays
excerpt: Can anyone tell me why I can’t select weekends on my Timeline column. This has been working fine and allowing me to select all 7 days of the week, but I can only select Monday- Friday dates now. ??

posts.author: antonygarnett (Antony)
posts.cookedHtml: Can anyone tell me why I can’t select weekends on my Timeline column. This has been working fine and allowing me to select all 7 days of the week, but I can only select Monday- Friday dates now. ??

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems like a Monday admin may have changed the weekend settings

image775×579 84 KB

This screenshot is from this document from Monday if you would like to read more. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005333969-The-Timeline-Column#:~:text=Note%3A%20You%20must%20be%20an,display%20weekends%20in%20your%20timeline!
If you are not an admin on the account, contact your admin to notify them that they changed this. They may have thought it was a personal setting not a global setting.
